## Summary

Describe the bug in one or two sentences.

- [ ] memory / learning script
- [ ] workflow definition

- [ ] documentation
- [ ] cross-platform behavior
- [ ] other

- Shell:
- Tool target: Codex / Cursor / Claude Code / other
- Repository path shape:

## What You Expected

Describe the expected behavior.

## What Happened

Describe the actual behavior.

## Reproduction Steps

1.
2.
3.

## Evidence

Include any relevant command lines, logs, screenshots, or file references.

## Memory / Workflow Boundary Notes

If relevant, clarify whether the behavior was:

- explicitly triggered
- unexpectedly automatic
- related to memory read/write
- related to promotion draft generation

## Additional Context

Add anything else that may help maintainers reproduce or reason about the issue.
